chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-94 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.705/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 04.08.2020 Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with Iftikhar Ahmed Rajput Litigation Officer on behalf of Secretary Education, Government of Sindh and Agha Suhail Ahmed, Managing Director, Sindh STEVTA. == Respondent No.4 (Agha Suhail Ahmed Managing Director STEVTA Sindh) has filed compliance report containing photocopy of certain documents including seniority list, copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. At the very outset, respondent No.4 submits that the point agitated in this petition would be resolved within forty five days from today after hearing the parties’ Advocates. Facing this situation, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition along-with listed application if, the respondent No.1 is directed to dispose off the case regarding seniority of the petitioner under the Law within forty five days under intimation to this Court. Accordingly, this petition is disposed off. However, office is directed to immediately send copy of this order to all the concerned quarters for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
